NOTE: These three planets may be in aparticular sigu or 5th or
5th, 9th to each other. When all these 3 planets are a single sign,
major disturbances in career (with inlmediate effect) are indicated.
Although the native will havethe powers of Administration/or the
position of a section head, still because of inimical aspects, no
significant achievement can be made, because the native tries to
express his power and egoism, thereby asking for troubles and
enemies.
